data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Failed payment retry logic', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or testing of this logic. The linked use case mentions various payment scenarios but does not specifically address how the system handles failed payment attempts or retries. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to support the validation of this requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of failed payment retry logic.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add failed payment retry logic validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system correctly implements retry logic for failed payments.
